Hello there! Ocean enthusiast ð

We're looking for ambassadors to represent our natural bracelets brand, @orckevibe ð³, and we believe you'd be a great fit! As an ambassador for our shared love of the ocean and nature, you will have the opportunity to try out our one-of-a-kind pieces and become a member of an exclusive community.

Thank you for taking the time to consider this opportunity; we hope to hear from you soon! ð
